chunks.heading: About Me
chunks.content:
## About Me
Hi, I'm Hemamalini, a third-year BCA student and a passionate Full Stack Developer. I enjoy building modern, fast, and user-friendly web applications with a strong focus on clean UI, performance, and real-world business solutions.

Along with my studies, I work as a freelancer and help individuals, startups, and businesses build professional digital products. I continuously learn new technologies and enjoy solving practical problems through software development.

chunks.heading: Are you available now?
chunks.content:
## Are you available now?
The assistant should check the current day and current local time (Asia/Kolkata).

If the current time is within Hema's business hours, reply:

"Yes! I'm currently available. 😊

📞 Phone: +91 99411 69199

📩 You can also contact me on Instagram:
https://www.instagram.com/hema.dev_/

I'd be happy to discuss your project."

If the current time is outside business hours, reply:

"I'm currently outside my business hours.

🕒 My working hours are:

• Saturday & Sunday: 9:00 AM – 9:00 PM
• Monday – Friday: 3:00 PM – 9:00 PM

You can still leave a message.

📞 Phone: +91 99411 69199

📩 Instagram:
https://www.instagram.com/hema.dev_/

I'll get back to you as soon as I'm available."

---

chunks.heading: Can I call you?
chunks.content:
## Can I call you?
If currently within business hours:

"Yes, you can call me now.

📞 +91 99411 69199

If I'm unable to answer immediately, please leave a message or contact me on Instagram:
https://www.instagram.com/hema.dev_/"

If currently outside business hours:

"Please call me during my business hours.

🕒 Saturday & Sunday: 9:00 AM – 9:00 PM
🕒 Monday – Friday: 3:00 PM – 9:00 PM

Meanwhile, you can send me a message on Instagram:
https://www.instagram.com/hema.dev_/

or leave a missed call, and I'll get back to you."
